name: Platform Recovery and Rebuild Planning
description: Turn a due diligence report into a concrete salvage and rebuild plan.

steps.name: Ingest Due Diligence Report
steps.description: Load structured findings, scorecard, and verdict.

steps.name: Classify Components
steps.description: Label every component as KEEP, MERGE, or DELETE.

steps.name: Design Production Foundation
steps.description: Specify backend, database, cache, queue, auth, multi-tenancy, and observability stack.

steps.name: Redesign AI Layer
steps.description: Replace keyword engines with LLM, RAG, embeddings, and agent framework.

steps.name: Redesign Digital Twin
steps.description: Define event-driven sync, graph backend, delta history, and conflict resolution.

steps.name: Define Connectors
steps.description: Specify PostgreSQL, Odoo ORM, Git, Docker, and Kubernetes connectors with security rules.

steps.name: Generate Roadmap
steps.description: Produce phased rebuild plan with team size and dates.

steps.name: Define MVP Scope
steps.description: Identify the smallest valuable use case to ship first.
